rolesanywhere.trustanchor.sourcedata.Cfn: The data field of the trust anchor depending on its type.

rolesanywhere.trustanchor.sourcedata.Acm.Description: The root certificate of the AWS Private Certificate Authority specified by this ARN is used in trust validation for temporary credential requests. Included for trust anchors of type `AWS_ACM_PCA`.

rolesanywhere.trustanchor.sourcedata.X50.Description: The PEM-encoded data for the certificate anchor. Included for trust anchors of type `CERTIFICATE_BUNDLE`.
